code:
%% Feature Mindmap Template
%% Replace with your actual feature breakdown

mindmap
  root((Product))
    Authentication
      Login
        Email/Password
        Social OAuth
        SSO/SAML
      Registration
        Email verification
        Onboarding flow
      Security
        2FA/MFA
        Session management
        Password policies
    User Management
      Profiles
        Avatar upload
        Preferences
        Notifications
      Organisations
        Team creation
        Role assignment
        Invitations
      Permissions
        Role-based access
        Resource sharing
        Audit logging
    Core Features
      Dashboard
        Analytics widgets
        Quick actions
        Recent activity
      Projects
        CRUD operations
        Collaboration
        Version history
      Tasks
        Assignment
        Due dates
        Comments
        Attachments
    Integrations
      APIs
        REST endpoints
        GraphQL
        Webhooks
      Third-party
        Slack
        GitHub
        Jira
      Import/Export
        CSV
        JSON
        PDF reports
    Infrastructure
      Performance
        Caching
        CDN
        Database optimisation
      Reliability
        Backups
        Monitoring
        Alerting
      Scalability
        Load balancing
        Auto-scaling
        Multi-region

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为这个产品功能做一个完整的思维导图，先从最顶层开始。根节点就叫"Product"，下面我想分成五大模块：Authentication、User Management、Core Features、Integrations，还有Infrastructure。这样覆盖从用户登录到系统底层的完整链路。
明白了，五大模块结构清晰。我先搭建这个骨架。Authentication部分您打算怎么处理登录方式？

Authentication下面分三块：Login、Registration、Security。Login要支持三种方式——传统的Email/Password、Social OAuth，还有企业级的SSO/SAML。Registration需要Email verification和Onboarding flow。Security这块必须加上2FA/MFA、Session management和Password policies。
好的，Authentication分支已完成。接下来User Management部分，我注意到您提到了Profiles和Organisations？

对，User Management分Profiles、Organisations和Permissions。Profiles包括Avatar upload、Preferences、Notifications；Organisations要有Team creation、Role assignment、Invitations；Permissions需要Role-based access、Resource sharing，还有Audit logging做合规。
User Management已添加。Core Features这块您想重点突出什么？
Core Features是用户日常高频使用的：Dashboard要有Analytics widgets、Quick actions、Recent activity；Projects需要完整的CRUD operations、Collaboration、Version history；Tasks则包含Assignment、Due dates、Comments、Attachments。
Integrations部分我看到有APIs和Third-party，Import/Export是否需要单独列出？

是的，Integrations分三块：APIs包括REST endpoints、GraphQL、Webhooks；Third-party对接Slack、GitHub、Jira；Import/Export支持CSV、JSON、PDF reports。最后Infrastructure部分，Performance要有Caching、CDN、Database optimisation；Reliability需要Backups、Monitoring、Alerting；Scalability包含Load balancing、Auto-scaling、Multi-region。
全部完成。我检查一下：Product五大模块，Authentication三层结构完整，User Management覆盖个人和组织维度，Core Features聚焦日常操作，Integrations打通内外数据流，Infrastructure保障底层能力。结构符合您的要求。
